name: UK Number One Albums
description: A curated revision pack of UK Official Albums Chart number ones across the decades.

question_templates.prompt: {category} whose name begins with a consonant
{category} containing at least one of the letters P, O, I, N, T, L, E or S
{category} with names of six letters or fewer
{category} whose title starts with the same letter as the artist

sources.label: Official Charts all UK number one albums
